parameters:
It looks like we could go down, but let's stop for
now.

Initial Equipment Box. It says: Weapons and armor
won't have any effect just by having them,
equip them from the menu!

I was worried about going bare-handed, so this is a
relief. I have a bad feeling about something, so let's
equip them right away.

I hope Mother is safe... First, let's search the shore
thoroughly.

events.name: オープニングイベント1

parameters:
Ugh... this place... it's not heaven, is it...? I
can't believe the ship sank...

Th-that's right! What about Mom!? I have to find her
right away.
To the 1st floor of the tower

Yes... I'm fine, more importantly, I'm glad... that
\V[3] is safe...
Nah, no one's around... just you and me, Mom

Anyway, there's what looks like a cave over there.
Let's check if we can rest there

I hope Mother is safe... First, let's search the shore
thoroughly.

Let's not go too far for now. There should be
something useful on the coast too.

I hope Mother is safe... First, let's search the
coastline thoroughly.

Let's not go too far for now. There should be
something useful on the coast too.

Do you want to fish? (You need a fishing rod and
worms)

You don't have a fishing rod, let's make one at the
workbench

\V[3]! I found a suspicious box! Come back here! What
if it's treasure?

events.name: エリアに入ると全回復

parameters:
\V[3]! I found a suspicious box! Come back here! What
if it's treasure?

A memory event has appeared on the coast (green heart
icon).

You can view the event by examining it. The mother-son
love level increases as you do so. It's not related to
the main story, so check it out whenever you feel like
it.

It says: Use the workbench (the box with a hammer
mark) to craft items and survive...!

If you've crafted an unnecessary item, dismantle it at
the workbench (the box with a hammer mark)!
Maybe I should decorate with cow bones...

Ah, so that's how you use it... You've always liked
that kind of thing, haven't you~

Motivation is surging! The party's attack power has
increased by 5!
You don't have any cow bones...
Memory 7 Is Mom Getting Horny Too?
Since the move is over, it's currently sealed off.

A wedding dress H-event has appeared on the first
beach.
I asked Mother to wear a wedding dress

When we first washed up on this island... I was so
anxious...

Eh...? Really? I thought you were handling it pretty
well.

I couldn't show my weak side in front of my child,
could I?

Just a few months ago, we were just mother and
child...
And now we're husband and wife...\i[12]
You really never know what life has in store.
Huh...? Mother, are you already regretting it...?

Let's make a baby here\i[12] Right where it all
began...
